---
title: ""
---

## Week 3

### Day 1

#### [Today]{style="color:red;"}

-   <p style="color:red;">University Holiday / No class today</p>

#### [Assigned]{style="color:red;"}


### Day 2 (lab)

#### [Today]{style="color:red;"}

-   Lecture: <a href="/FW670/likelihood.qmd">Likelihood and Optimization</a>

-   Lecture Code: <a href="/FW670/likelihood.R">Likelihood.R</a>

-   Lecture: <a href="/FW670/regression.qmd">Regression</a>

-   Downloads: <a href="/classfiles/regressionlab/week3files.zip">Files</a>

-   Install R packages:

```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
# CRAN packages
  install.packages(c("marginaleffects","ggResidpanel"))
```

##### **In Class Discussion Questions for Duscoff et al.2019**

-   What is biological significance and statistical significance?
-   What is a p-value and what are the issues with null hypothesis testing?
